Title: st_geomfromtext
Description: Parses the string and returns the corresponding geometry.

Parses the string and returns the corresponding geometry. The string is to be in well known text
representation (WKT).
Examples:
SQL>SELECT st_geomfromtext ('point (10.03 30.01)', 2000);
callret
VARCHAR
 POINT(10.03 30.01)
No. of rows in result: 1
